testcase.name: deleteMenuItemReturnsNoContent
testcase.system-out:
09:56:30.546 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemControllerIntegrationTest]: MenuItemControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:56:30.725 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.foodordering.menuservice.MenuServiceApplication for test class com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemControllerIntegrationTest 09:56:30.830 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/sagee/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: getMenuItemByIdReturnsMenuItem
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-26T09:56:33.134+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemController#getMenuItemById(Long) 2026-03-26T09:56:33.169+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.177+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [MenuItemResponse[id=1, itemName=Chicken Burger, category=Burger, price=1250.0, available=true]]

testcase.name: createMenuItemReturnsValidationErrorsForInvalidPayload
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-26T09:56:33.239+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemController#createMenuItem(MenuItemRequest) 2026-03-26T09:56:33.294+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Read "application/json;charset=UTF-8" to [com.foodordering.menuservice.dto.MenuItemRequest@66e1b2a] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.360+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.foodordering.menuservice.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleValidationException(MethodArgumentNotValidException, HttpServletRequest) 2026-03-26T09:56:33.367+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.372+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ApiErrorResponse[timestamp=2026-03-26T09:56:33.363400, status=400, error=Bad Request, message=Valida (truncated)...] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.376+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.foodordering.menuservice.dto.MenuItemResponse> com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemController.createMenuItem(com.foodordering.menuservice.dto.MenuItemRequest) with 4 errors: [Field error in object 'menuItemRequest' on field 'available': rejected value [null]; arguments []; default message [available]]; default message [Availability is required]] [Field error in object 'menuItemRequest' on field 'price': rejected value [-1.0]; codes [DecimalMin.menuItemRequest.price,DecimalMin.price,DecimalMin.java.lang.Double,DecimalMin]; testcase.name: getAllMenuItemsReturnsMenuItems
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-26T09:56:33.387+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemController#getAllMenuItems() 2026-03-26T09:56:33.397+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.397+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [[MenuItemResponse[id=1, itemName=Chicken Burger, category=Burger, price=1250.0, available=true], Men (truncated)...]

testcase.name: updateMenuItemReturnsUpdatedMenuItem

testcase.name: getMenuItemByIdReturnsNotFoundForMissingMenuItem
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-26T09:56:33.413+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.menuservice.controller.MenuItemController#getMenuItemById(Long) 2026-03-26T09:56:33.416+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.foodordering.menuservice.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleResourceNotFound(ResourceNotFoundException, HttpServletRequest) 2026-03-26T09:56:33.416+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.416+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ApiErrorResponse[timestamp=2026-03-26T09:56:33.416403, status=404, error=Not Found, message=Menu ite (truncated)...] 2026-03-26T09:56:33.417+05:30 DEBUG 11337 --- [menu-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [com.foodordering.menuservice.exception.ResourceNotFoundException: Menu item not found with id 999]

testcase.name: createMenuItemReturnsCreatedMenuItem
